prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AWNCLMPCARB-4PC-BUN Product Type: HARDWARE_CLAMP_VISE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Carabiner and Awning Clamp Set Camping Essentials Tarp Clips 4pc Set Description: The ASR Outdoor 4pc clamp and carabiner set prove to be a camping essential - the durable plastic clamps are great for tying down awnings and camping tarps, and the carabiners provide a convenient clip so you can hang the clamps when not in use.

The tarp clamps are constructed of high-quality ABS plastic that is designed to be tough and weatherproof so you can use them with confidence, rain or shine. The carabiners are made of aluminum that won't rust (they are NOT for climbing).

In addition to tying down camping tarps, the clamps are great for awnings, fabric, party tents, and pipe frames. The carabiners will come in handy for other uses like carrying grocery bags and keeping items organized and easy to reach on your backpack, in your car, RV, or boat.

Each of the included carabiners comes with a convenient key ring for easy attachment to your keys, lanyards, and other necessities. Carabiners are great accessories to keep around your house, office or bug out bag. Make sure to grab a set of these clamps and carabiners before your next outdoor adventure. Search Terms: carabiner hook tarp clips small mini clamps heavy duty awning tarp clips multi purpose home rv awning clamps camping essentials campsite hiking outdoors wilderness light weight hanging tarpline clothing line gear hang travel Features: - STRONG AND SECURE - The ASR Outdoor 4pc clamp and carabiner set proves to be a camping essential - the durable plastic clamps are great for tying down awnings and camping tarps, and the carabiners provide a convenient clip so you can hang the clamps when not in use. - RUGGED DURABILITY - The tarp clamps are constructed of high-quality ABS plastic that are designed to be tough and weatherproof so you can use them with confidence, rain or shine. The carabiners are made of aluminum that won't rust (they are NOT for climbing). - VERSATILE OUTDOOR TOOLS - In addition to tying down camping tarps, the clamps are great for awnings, fabric, party tents and pipe frames. The carabiners will come in handy for other uses like carrying grocery bags and keeping items organized and easy to reach on your backpack, in your car, RV or boat. - CONVENIENT KEY CHAINS - Each of the included carabiners comes with a convenient key ring for easy attachment to your keys, lanyards and other necessities. Carabiners are great accessories to keep around your house, office or bug out bag. - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: ABS plastic (tarp clamps), aluminum (carabiners); 4 piece set; Colors: Assorted; Dimensions: 2.75"/7mm length (carabiners), 3.25" x 1" (clamps); Carabiners are NOT FOR CLIMBING === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-pc Carabiner and Awning Clamp Set
